<<The coefficient>> <<of the>> <<term x²y³>> <<in the>> <<expansion of>> <<the binomial>> <<(x + y)⁵>> <<is 10>>.

<<To find>> <<this value>> <<we use>> <<the binomial>> <<theorem formula>> <<C(n, k)>> <<where n = 5>> <<and k = 3>> <<for the>> <<power of>> <<y. This>> <<gives 5!>> <<divided by>> <<3! times>> <<2! which>> <<equals 10>>.
